debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ

S : Finset ℕ

hp₁ : IMO2022P3.Condition k S p₁
hp₂ : IMO2022P3.Condition k S p₂
⊢ (∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j + i)) ∨ ∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j.rev + i)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let d := 4 * k - 1
  let E : ℕ → ℕ → Prop := λ a b => a ≠ b ∧ ∃ u, u ≥ 3 ∧ 4 * a * b = u^2 + d
  have hE : ∀ {p : Fin #S ≃ S}, Condition k S p → ∀ i, E (p i) (p (i + 1)) := by

    rcases hp i with ⟨x, hx, hpx⟩
    have hodd : Odd (2 * x + 1) := ⟨x, rfl⟩
    have hge3 : 2 * x + 1 ≥ 3 := by linarith
    refine ⟨?_, 2 * x + 1, hge3, ?_⟩
    · intro h; have : (p i : ℕ) * p (i + 1) = (p i : ℕ)^2 := by rw [h]; linarith

      have hodd_pi := (hS (p i) (p i).2).1
      have hprime_pi := (hS (p i) (p i).2).2
      have h_sq : (2 * (p i : ℕ))^2 - (2 * x + 1)^2 = d := by rw [← hpx]; ring
      have h_fact : (2 * (p i : ℕ) - (2 * x + 1)) * (2 * (p i : ℕ) + (2 * x + 1)) = d := by
        rw [← h_sq]; ring
      have h_le : 2 * (p i : ℕ) + (2 * x + 1) ≤ d := by
        have h_pos : 0 < 2 * (p i : ℕ) - (2 * x + 1) := by
          refine pos_of_mul_pos_left ?_ (by linarith)
          rw [h_fact]; linarith
        rw [← h_fact]; exact Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ h_pos
      linarith [hk]
    · ring_nf; rw [hpx]; ring
  have h_unique_neighbors : ∀ q ∈ S, q = S.max' (Finset.nonempty_of_ne_zero (by
      by_contra h_empty; simp [h_empty] at hp₁)) → ∀ p ∈ S, E q p →
      p ∈ ({ (p₁ (p₁.symm ⟨q, ‹q ∈ S›⟩ - 1) : ℕ), (p₁ (p₁.symm ⟨q, ‹q ∈ S›⟩ + 1) : ℕ) } : Finset ℕ) := by
    intro q hqS hqmax p hpS hep
    have hqpos : 0 < q := (hS q hqS).2.pos
    rcases hep with ⟨hqp, u, hu, h_eq⟩
    have hu_lt : u < 2 * q := by
      have : u^2 < (2 * q)^2 := by
        rw [h_eq]; have : p < q := S.lt_max'_of_mem_erase_max' (Finset.mem_erase.2 ⟨hqp.symm, hpS⟩)
        calc 4 * q * p - d < 4 * q * p := by linarith
        _ < 4 * q * q := by rel [this]
        _ = (2 * q)^2 := by ring
      exact lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left 2 (by linarith) this
    let i := p₁.symm ⟨q, hqS⟩
    rcases hE hp₁ i with ⟨-, u1, hu1, h_eq1⟩
    rcases hE hp₁ (i - 1) with ⟨-, u2, hu2, h_eq2⟩
    have : u^2 ≡ -d [MOD 4 * q] := by rw [h_eq]; simp
    have h1 : u1^2 ≡ -d [MOD 4 * q] := by rw [h_eq1]; simp
    have h2 : u2^2 ≡ -d [MOD 4 * q] := by rw [Fin.sub_one, Fin.add_one] at h_eq2; rw [h_eq2]; simp
    have h_sol : ∀ x < 2 * q, x^2 ≡ -d [MOD 4 * q] → x = u1 ∨ x = 2 * q - u1 := by
      intro x hx hx2; have h_mod : x^2 ≡ u1^2 [MOD q] := by
        apply Nat.ModEq.of_mul_left (4 : ℕ); rw [Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_comm 4]; exact hx2.trans h1.symm
      have h_prime := (hS q hqS).2
      rcases h_prime.modEq_sq_iff.1 h_mod with hx_mod | hx_mod
      · have : x ≡ u1 [MOD 2 * q] := by
          refine Nat.ModEq.modeq_of_dvd_of_modeq (by simp) ?_
          refine Nat.ModEq.of_mul_left (2 : ℕ) ?_
          have h_odd : x % 2 = 1 ∧ u1 % 2 = 1 := by
            have : d % 4 = 3 := by rw [show 4 * k - 1 = 4 * (k - 1) + 3 by linarith]; simp

            exact ⟨Nat.odd_iff_spec.1 (Nat.odd_pow.1 (Nat.odd_iff_spec.2 (by rw [this]; norm_num))),
